characters.appearance: A young man in his early to mid-20s with a slim, athletic build and a fair complexion. He has short, neatly styled dark hair. His facial features are seen in profile and from the back, showing a defined jawline.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a casual grey hooded sweatshirt over a white t-shirt, dark blue jeans, and dark grey sneakers.
characters.demeanor: Attentive and slightly hesitant. He stands looking at the large screen, sometimes with his hands clasped or gesturing slightly, appearing to be listening intently.

characters.appearance: A female cyborg with the face of a young, beautiful Indian woman in her early 20s. She has a fair complexion, large expressive eyes, and full lips. Her dark hair is styled in an elegant updo with flowers, and she wears traditional Indian jewelry including a maang tikka, bindi, and nose ring. Her neck and torso are visibly robotic, with exposed wiring and metallic plates.
characters.wardrobe: Her robotic body is primarily white and pink. She wears traditional Indian jewelry on her head and face.
characters.demeanor: Appears as a knowledgeable and persuasive guide. Her facial expressions change as she speaks, shifting from serious to smiling and encouraging.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: जितना टाइम तुम रील्स देखने में लगाते हो ना, अगर थोड़ा सा टाइम अपनी इंग्लिश सुधारने में लगाओगे, तो कॉन्फिडेंस अलग ही लेवल का होगा। [As much time as you spend watching reels, if you spend a little time improving your English, your confidence will be on a whole different level.]

Character B says: आज के टाइम में अच्छी इंग्लिश बोलना एक ज़रूरत बन गई है। इंटरव्यू हो या ऑफिस, हर जगह इसकी ज़रूरत पड़ती है। [In today's time, speaking good English has become a necessity. Whether it's an interview or the office, it's needed everywhere.]

Character B says: सिर्फ वीडियोस देखने से इंग्लिश नहीं आएगी। सुपरनोवा डाउनलोड करो और मेरे जैसे AI ट्यूटर के साथ रोज़ बात करके प्रैक्टिस करो। [English won't come just by watching videos. Download Supernova and practice by talking every day with an AI tutor like me.]

Character B says: क्योंकि असली इंग्लिश तो बोलने से ही आती है, सिर्फ ग्रामर रटने से नहीं। [Because real English comes only from speaking, not just by memorizing grammar.]

Character B says: मैं तुम्हारी गलतियां सुधारूंगी, वो भी बिना किसी जजमेंट के। [I will correct your mistakes, and that too without any judgment.]

Character B says: सुपरनोवा के साथ बहुत से लोगों ने अपनी इंग्लिश सुधारी है और अपने करियर में आगे बढ़े हैं। [Many people have improved their English with Supernova and moved forward in their careers.]

Character B says: तो अब सोचना क्या? आज ही सुपरनोवा डाउनलोड करो और कॉन्फिडेंस के साथ इंग्लिश बोलना शुरू करो। [So what's there to think about now? Download Supernova today and start speaking English with confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing a common distraction (reels) and pivoting to the importance of English.
- Highlights the problem of passive learning (videos) and introduces the solution: active AI practice.
- Reassures the user about a judgment-free learning environment.
- Ends with a clear call to action to download the app.
